text.title: ba-strategic-partnership Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for ba-strategic-partnership as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Running the rubric without org-context (mission, OKRs, customer evidence).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Without real context the agent emits generic "be more strategic" platitudes; the rubric scores evidence_grounding at 0 for any rewrite without an org_context anchor.

failure-mode.description: Rewrites applied to stakeholder-visible artifacts without human review.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Strategic-partner rewrites read as AI-generated and bland when applied without the BA's voice; ship rewrites as suggestions, never overwrite the source artifact.

failure-mode.description: Using the rubric on solo/startup contexts with shared BA hats.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The full 6-axis rubric over-formalizes one-person teams; collapse to three axes (problem, outcome, kill) for teams under 5 people.

failure-mode.description: Agent rationalizes order-taker language when the original author's name is in context.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Strip authorship metadata before the prompt; instruct the reviewer to assume the artifact is anonymous.

failure-mode.description: Strategic-partner rewrites drift toward consultant-speak: vision, alignment, synergy, leverage.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Ban a stoplist in the system prompt; reject and regenerate any rewrite containing these terms.

failure-mode.description: Confirmation bias: agent finds a doc the user wrote to be strategic.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Red-team pass by a second instance with system prompt "assume this is order-taker until proved otherwise".

failure-mode.description: Auto-block firing on a regulated or contractually-bound spec without human review.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: All three mandatory checkpoints are human: (1) before any rewrite is applied to a stakeholder-visible artifact, (2) before auto-block fires on a regulated spec, (3) before a stance score becomes part of an individual's performance review.
